description: Item quality ratio definitions per monster level.

Function.description: Quality ratio function type (standard formula or Uber override). Not read by 1.13c engine

Unique.description: Base ratio for unique item quality chance

UniqueDivisor.description: Divisor applied to monster level when calculating unique item chance

Rare.description: Base ratio for rare item quality chance. Not read by 1.13c engine

RareDivisor.description: Divisor applied to monster level when calculating rare item chance

Set.description: Base ratio value for set item quality chance. Not read by 1.13c engine

SetDivisor.description: Divisor applied to monster level when calculating set item chance

Magic.description: Base ratio value for magic item quality chance

MagicDivisor.description: Divisor applied to monster level when calculating magic item chance

HiQuality.description: Base ratio value for superior (high quality) item chance

HiQualityDivisor.description: Divisor applied to monster level when calculating superior item chance

Normal.description: Base ratio value for normal item quality chance

NormalDivisor.description: Divisor applied to monster level when calculating normal item chance
